name: The Warrens - PC Quarters
summary: A private room on Level 2 of The Warrens bunker complex, serving as personal quarters for a Nosferatu PC with access to most facility areas except other residents' private rooms and the high-security server room.
description:
Your room is on Level 2 of The Warrens, one of several private quarters carved from the original military facility's officer accommodations. The space is perhaps twelve by fourteen feet, its walls the same institutional gray concrete as the rest of the complex, painted decades ago and never updated. A single fluorescent tube in a wire cage provides harsh white light that makes shadows sharp and unforgiving. The floor is bare concrete, cool to the touch even through your boots, and the ceiling stretches to ten feet—military construction, built to last. A simple cot occupies one corner, its frame metal, its mattress thin and covered with a gray wool blanket that smells of dust and something else, something old and underground. A small desk sits against the opposite wall, its surface scarred from decades of use, holding a stack of technical manuals and a 1990s-era laptop computer connected to the facility's network via a thick cable that snakes up the wall and disappears into the ceiling.

The room has no windows—you're three levels underground, surrounded by tons of concrete and steel. The only way out is through the door that opens onto Level 2's corridor, a long hallway that connects all the private quarters. From your room, you can access most of The Warrens: the common areas on Level 1 where informal meetings happen, the library with its extensive technical documentation and Nosferatu information archives, the storage areas on Level 3, the workshop where Phreak maintains his electronics, even the sewer connection tunnels that lead to various parts of the Phoenix underground. But some doors remain locked. The other Nosferatu's private rooms—Alistaire's sanctum, Terry's quarters, Betty's space, Core and Phreak's rooms—those are off-limits. And the high-security server room on Level 1, where the cutting-edge computer systems and Shrecknet hub operate, that's restricted to Betty, Core, and Phreak only.

The psychological weight of living here isn't in the room itself—it's in what surrounds it. The Warrens is a place of secrets, of information flowing through digital networks and whispered conversations, of rats that watch from the shadows and report everything to Alistaire. You're part of something larger, a node in a network of intelligence and surveillance that extends far beyond these concrete walls. The constant hum of the HVAC system, the distant sound of servers cooling, the occasional scurry of rats in the walls—it all reminds you that you're never truly alone here. Every movement is monitored, every conversation potentially overheard, every action part of a larger pattern that you can sense but never fully see.

But the most unsettling thing about this room isn't the surveillance or the restrictions. It's the knowledge that you're sleeping in a space that was designed for a different purpose entirely. This was built as a military facility, a place where men planned operations that would end lives, where secrets were kept and orders were followed without question. The walls have absorbed decades of that purpose, of the weight of hidden knowledge and the burden of secrets too dangerous to share. And sometimes, in the deepest hours of the night, when the facility is quiet except for the hum of machinery and the distant sound of someone working in the computer room, you can feel it—the sense that the building itself is aware, that it's watching, that it remembers every secret it's ever held. The Warrens doesn't just house information. It is information, and you're just another piece of data being processed in its endless, silent calculations.
notes: Potential haven if PC is of that Clan. Located on Level 2 of The Warrens bunker complex (The Warrens id: 7). PC has access to most areas of The Warrens including: Level 1 common areas, library, Level 3 storage and workshop, sewer connection tunnels, and general facility areas. Access restricted from: other Nosferatu private quarters (Alistaire's sanctum, Terry's quarters, Betty's quarters, Core's quarters, Phreak's quarters), and the high-security server room on Level 1 (restricted to Betty, Core, and Phreak). The room is part of the original military facility's officer accommodations, repurposed for Nosferatu residents. Description suitable for cinematic introduction to The Warrens.
status_notes: Operational as part of The Warrens complex. Room maintained according to facility standards. Access privileges subject to Alistaire's approval and good standing within the clan.
owner_notes: Part of The Warrens complex owned by Alistaire (8th generation Nosferatu Primogen). PC has residence rights as a clan member but does not own the room or facility. Access and privileges are granted based on clan hierarchy and standing within the Nosferatu.
access_notes: Access controlled by Alistaire and facility security protocols. PC has access to: personal room (Level 2), Level 1 common areas, library (Level 2), Level 3 storage and workshop, sewer connection tunnels, and general facility areas. Access restricted from: other Nosferatu private quarters (Alistaire's sanctum on Level 3, Terry's quarters on Level 2, Betty's quarters on Level 2, Core's quarters on Level 2, Phreak's quarters on Level 2), and the high-security server room on Level 1 (restricted to Betty, Core, and Phreak only). Electronic locks and camera surveillance monitor access throughout the facility. Alistaire's rat network provides additional surveillance.
security_notes: Security inherits from The Warrens overall maximum security fortress. Room is on Level 2 of three-level underground bunker complex. Military-grade reinforced concrete and steel construction. No windows, completely underground and sunlight-protected. Electronic locks and camera surveillance throughout facility. Alistaire's Animalism 5 rat network provides constant organic surveillance. Ghouls (Earl and Dale) patrol and maintain security. Access to room controlled by facility security protocols. All security features of The Warrens apply to this sub-location.
utility_notes: PC has access to all utilities available in The Warrens complex: Blood storage (Level 3), computers (network access from room, but high-security server room restricted), library (Level 2, extensive technical documentation and Nosferatu archives), medical (basic supplies), workshop (Level 3, Phreak's electronics repair), hidden caches (throughout facility), armory (Level 3), communications (network access, phone lines, Shrecknet connection). Room itself contains: laptop computer with network connection, desk, basic furniture. Most utilities accessed by leaving room and using facility areas.
social_features: PC room is part of larger Warrens complex that serves as social hub for Phoenix Nosferatu. Level 1 common areas used for informal meetings and clan discussions. Weekly Nosferatu meetings held in common areas. Library serves as informal gathering space. PC can participate in facility social activities but room itself is private space. Capacity for social functions is extensive (full facility), but PC's personal space is limited to small room. Social standing within clan determines access to various facility areas and information.
magical_protection: Inherits from The Warrens overall magical protection. Alistaire's Animalism 5 rat network provides constant supernatural surveillance throughout all levels. Phreak's electromagnetic field creates unintentional interference with certain supernatural detection methods. The facility's isolation and secrecy serve as primary magical protection. The building itself seems aware, watching, processing information in endless silent calculations.
cursed_blessed: Living in The Warrens is both blessing and burden. Access to resources, information, and protection, but also constant surveillance, facility restrictions, and the ever-present awareness that you're part of a larger network where every action is monitored. The building remembers every secret it's ever held, and you're just another piece of data being processed in its endless calculations.
relationship_notes: PC quarters are a private room on Level 2 of The Warrens bunker complex (The Warrens id: 7). Part of the original military facility's officer accommodations, repurposed for Nosferatu residents. Connected to Level 2 corridor which provides access to other private quarters, library, and facility areas. PC has access to most Warrens areas except other Nosferatu private rooms and high-security server room. Description suitable for cinematic introduction to The Warrens facility.
